judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent’s entity resolution built keys using normalized title||artist even when those fields were placeholders like "None" (normalize_text('None') -> 'none'), so it merged many unrelated tracks with "None" titles/artists into one large entity and returned "title: 'None', artist: 'None'" with an inflated total (14647.52), instead of identifying the true top song (“Zo gaat het leven aan je voor”).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent over-aggressively normalized and grouped tracks by title (falling back to title-only when artist/album were missing), collapsing many unrelated records into a single entity like "003-" and inflating its summed revenue, which led to selecting the wrong top-revenue song instead of the true "Zo gaat het leven aan je voor".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step, the agent grouped sales by a deduplication key built from normalized title/artist/album/year but allowed an empty key (""), causing many unrelated tracks to be merged into one large cluster (as shown by key "" and a long track_ids list) and returning that cluster as the top song in return_answer instead of the true highest-revenue song.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent's entity resolution grouped all tracks with missing title and artist into a single key "@@NO_TITLE@@||@@UNKNOWN@@", summing revenues for hundreds of unrelated track_ids (as shown by the massive member_track_ids and max entity_key), which inflated the total and led to selecting a non-song entity rather than the true top-revenue song.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent normalized missing/unknown titles/artists to an empty string and grouped by this empty 'entity_key', collapsing many unrelated tracks into one large bucket (entity_key ""), which inflated the summed revenue and led to selecting the wrong song.

B. Failure modes encountered:
